name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.FallOverWallHelper.BodyTwist
summary: Amount of twist to apply to the spine as the character tries to fling himself over the wall, provides more of a believable roll but increases the amount of lateral space the character needs to successfully flip.
remarks:
Default value = 0.5f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
